description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Core that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.11, 3.12, 3.13). For each job, check out the repository with submodules, run codespell, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip and tox, run core system info and integration tests (only for Python 3.11), and send a Slack notification on failure.
